entities.name: V
entities.context: Person whose knowledge system is being documented; asked to confirm capability changes

entities.name: Capability Registry
entities.context: Registry system for tracking N5 capabilities; updated based on conversation type

entities.name: N5
entities.context: Capability system that can be created or changed through build/orchestrator threads

entities.name: Build Thread
entities.context: Conversation type that may create or change capabilities; triggers registry updates

entities.name: Orchestrator Thread
entities.context: Conversation type that may create or change capabilities; triggers registry updates

entities.name: Non-build Thread
entities.context: Conversation type that does not trigger capability registry updates

entities.name: Ephemeral Thread
entities.context: Short-lived conversation type excluded from capability registry updates

relationships.context: V's system uses the Capability Registry to track N5 capabilities
Build threads may update the Capability Registry when capabilities are created/changed
Orchestrator threads may update the Capability Registry when capabilities are created/changed
Build threads can create new or significantly change existing N5 capabilities
Orchestrator threads can create new or significantly change existing N5 capabilities
